Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityHazard

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction, IAbilityZone
    public interface IAbilityHazard
extends IAbilityZone
    API interface for Hazard abilities. Persistent ground effect zones placed around the caster.

    • Method Summary

      • getDamageInterval

        Returns:
